details.request: Explain the Codex transport UTF-8 header encoding error caused by the workspace path and document prevention guidance so it does not recur.

spec.objective: Add operational guidance for avoiding UTF-8 transport header failures when workspace paths contain non-ASCII characters.
success_criteria: Explain the observed error cause to the user.
Identify an appropriate guide document for the prevention note.
Update the guide document with concrete prevention and recovery guidance.
Verify the documentation change is present and no sensitive values are recorded.
scope: docs/operations or another relevant guide document

details.reason: Initial event was created immediately with placeholder clock value before reading system time; corrected timestamp is recorded append-only here.

details.summary: Added CLI transport metadata encoding guidance and updated the authority pointer version for tool permissions.
details.security_note: Did not record raw session metadata or user-specific transport header values beyond the generic header name and redacted symptom.

checks.name: sensitive_metadata_minimization
checks.evidence: The guide records the generic failure signature and prevention steps, not raw session_id/turn_id values.
